final:
module top_module(input [32-1:0] din, 
                                   input clk, en, rst,
                                   output reg [32-1:0] dout
    );always @(posedge clk)
begin
  if(rst)
  dout <= 0;
  
  else
  if(en)
    dout <= din;
  
end 


  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      dout <= ~din; // Misleading assignment to create confusion
    end
  end

endmodule

params_used.custom_dead_stmts: dout <= ~din; // Misleading assignment to create confusion
